'''鈭歬-k-p-b''' ('''kakakpeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultrasonicate|ultrasonicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultrasonicate|ultrasonicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-k-p-b
|-
! Lemma
| kakakpeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikakpeboko|thikakpeboko]] || [[word:jikakpeboko|jikakpeboko]] || [[word:shikakpeboko|shikakpeboko]] || [[word:kikakpeboko|kikakpeboko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
